languages.text: "Согласно поступающим данным, ажиотаж среди рабочих вызван работой медикариев в Секторе Бионика. Похоже, они стремятся получить доступ к священным {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугментациям{/g}".

traits.locale_text: "Согласно поступающим данным, ажиотаж среди рабочих вызван работой медикариев в Секторе Бионика. Похоже, они стремятся получить доступ к священным {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугментациям{/g}".

languages.text: "According to the reports received, the work of the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica has caused this commotion among the workers. It appears the rabble are seeking access to sacred {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentations{/g}."
languages.original_text: "Согласно поступающим данным, ажиотаж среди рабочих вызван работой медикариев в Секторе Бионика. Похоже, они стремятся получить доступ к священным {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугментациям{/g}".

traits.locale_text: "According to the reports received, the work of the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica has caused this commotion among the workers. It appears the rabble are seeking access to sacred {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentations{/g}."

"According to the reports received, the work of the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica has caused this commotion among the workers. It appears the rabble are seeking access to sacred augmentations."

"According to the reports received, the work of the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica has caused this commotion among the workers. It appears the rabble are seeking access to sacred augmentations."

languages.text: 「報告によると、セクター・ビオニカの医療官の仕事が、労働者たちの騒ぎを引き起こしたようです。暴徒たちは聖なる増幅器へのアクセスを求めているようです」
languages.original_text: "According to the reports received, the work of the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica has caused this commotion among the workers. It appears the rabble are seeking access to sacred augmentations."

languages.text: "Alınan raporlara göre Sektör Biyonika'daki sıhhiye subaylarının çalışmaları, işçiler arasında bu kargaşaya neden olmuş. Görünüşe göre ayaktakımı, kutsal {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}ogmentasyonlara{/g} erişim istiyor."
languages.original_text: "According to the reports received, the work of the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica has caused this commotion among the workers. It appears the rabble are seeking access to sacred {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentations{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "Alınan raporlara göre Sektör Biyonika'daki sıhhiye subaylarının çalışmaları, işçiler arasında bu kargaşaya neden olmuş. Görünüşe göre ayaktakımı, kutsal ogmentasyonlara erişim istiyor."

languages.text: “据现有情报称，仿生区医务官的所作所为在劳工中引发了此次骚乱。这群贱民似乎妄图染指神圣的{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}植入物{/g}技术。”
languages.original_text: "According to the reports received, the work of the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica has caused this commotion among the workers. It appears the rabble are seeking access to sacred {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentations{/g}."

traits.locale_text: “据现有情报称，仿生区医务官的所作所为在劳工中引发了此次骚乱。这群贱民似乎妄图染指神圣的植入物技术。”

languages.text: "Den Berichten zufolge hat die Arbeit der Medicae-Offiziere im Sektor Bionica die Unruhen unter den Arbeitern ausgelöst. Offenbar will sich das Gesindel Zugang zu heiligen {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Augmentationen{/g} verschaffen."
languages.original_text: "According to the reports received, the work of the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica has caused this commotion among the workers. It appears the rabble are seeking access to sacred {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentations{/g}."

traits.locale_text: "Den Berichten zufolge hat die Arbeit der Medicae-Offiziere im Sektor Bionica die Unruhen unter den Arbeitern ausgelöst. Offenbar will sich das Gesindel Zugang zu heiligen Augmentationen verschaffen."

languages.text: « D'après les rapports que nous avons reçus, l'émoi des ouvriers est lié au travail des officiers de medicae dans le secteur Bionica. Apparemment, la populace exige d'accéder elle aussi aux {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentations{/g} sacrées. »
languages.original_text: "According to the reports received, the work of the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica has caused this commotion among the workers. It appears the rabble are seeking access to sacred {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentations{/g}."

traits.locale_text: « D'après les rapports que nous avons reçus, l'émoi des ouvriers est lié au travail des officiers de medicae dans le secteur Bionica. Apparemment, la populace exige d'accéder elle aussi aux augmentations sacrées. »

languages.text: «Según los informes de los que disponemos, el trabajo de los oficiales de medicae del Sector Bionica ha desatado la conmoción. Parece que esa chusma busca acceder a los sagrados {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}aumentos{/g}».
languages.original_text: "According to the reports received, the work of the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica has caused this commotion among the workers. It appears the rabble are seeking access to sacred {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentations{/g}."

traits.locale_text: «Según los informes de los que disponemos, el trabajo de los oficiales de medicae del Sector Bionica ha desatado la conmoción. Parece que esa chusma busca acceder a los sagrados aumentos».
